Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael S.Keck,Telephone 415-7972376, Plaintiff, appearing on his own behalf (CourtCall)
Eric M. Safire, Esq., Telephone 415-292-1940, Defendant appearing on his own behalf;

Ruling - ARGUED - The court makes the following ruling;

Defendant Eric Safire'S Demurrer To Complaint (Specially Set At 9am In Dept 302 Before Judge Kahn.)

Defendant Eric Safire'S Demurrer To Complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff is to prepare an order that is verbatim with the Court ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

(As fully in the reported in the reporters transcripts)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com =(302/HEK)
